summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Preferred and Income Securities ETF (JPRF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF, providing exposure to preferred securities, contingent convertible, and corporate hybrid debt securities globally. The ETF seeks to deliver high yield-like return. JPRF was launched on Jul 10, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
